problem id: dfbf4e0e
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(1) XOR SHL(2)

examples:
  01100111 -> 01010010
  00111011 -> 10011010
  10010000 -> 01100001
  11101001 -> 01110111
  01000110 -> 10010100
  10111011 -> 10011011
  00000010 -> 00001100
  01010010 -> 11101100

query: 10001001
predicted answer: 00110111
